title: Lomaridium acutum
taxonomy: Lomaridium acutum is classified as a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. This family is part of the order Polypodiales, which is a group of vascular plants commonly known as polypody ferns. The classification of Lomaridium acutum further breaks down into the genus Lomaridium and the species L. acutum. This classification helps to group and categorize plants based on their shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of Lomaridium acutum.
